## Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] The change has a bounded scope.
- [ ] The repository status and claims remain accurate.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private data, or internal logs are included.
- [ ] New runtime behavior is testable or diagnosable.
- [ ] Failure modes are documented when relevant.
